message: *FL variable has a value other than Y, N, or null (single-dataset check)
description: A variable with a suffix of FL must have a value of Y, N, or null (single-dataset variant). Uses ONTRTFL as a representative *FL variable within a single dataset.

message: *FL variable has a value other than Y, N, or null
description: A variable with a suffix of FL must have a value of Y, N, or null. This rule uses ONTRTFL as a representative *FL variable. Full coverage requires checking all *FL columns across all ADaM datasets.

message: *FN variable has a value other than 0, 1, or null (single-dataset check)
description: A variable with a suffix of FN must have a value of 0, 1, or null (single-dataset variant). Uses ONTRTFN as a representative *FN variable.

message: *FN variable has a value other than 0, 1, or null
description: A variable with a suffix of FN must have a value of 0, 1, or null. This rule uses ONTRTFN as a representative *FN variable. Full coverage requires checking all *FN columns across all ADaM datasets.

message: Numeric flag variable *FN is present but corresponding *FL variable is missing or null
description: If a numeric flag (*FN) variable is present, its corresponding character flag (*FL) variable must also be present. This rule uses SAFFN/SAFFL as a representative *FN/*FL pair. Full coverage requires checking all paired *FN/*FL columns.

message: *FL = Y but corresponding *FN is not 1
description: When a flag variable (*FL) has value Y, its corresponding numeric flag (*FN) must be 1. This rule uses SAFFL/SAFFN as a representative *FL/*FN pair.

message: *FL = N but corresponding *FN is not 0
description: When a flag variable (*FL) has value N, its corresponding numeric flag (*FN) must be 0. This rule uses SAFFL/SAFFN as a representative *FL/*FN pair.

message: *FL is null but corresponding *FN is not null
description: When a flag variable (*FL) is null, its corresponding numeric flag (*FN) must also be null. Uses ONTRTFL/ONTRTFN as representative pair (non-population flags where null is allowed).

message: Variable name violates ADaM naming convention (max 8 chars, start with letter, A-Z/0-9/_ only)
description: ADaM variable names must be no more than 8 characters in length, must start with a letter A-Z or a-z, and may only contain letters, numbers, and underscores. Uses STUDYID as a representative; full enforcement requires checking all variable names.

message: Variable name does not start with an English letter (A-Z, a-z)
description: All ADaM variable names must start with an English letter (A-Z or a-z). This is a structural metadata rule; the check uses STUDYID as a representative to confirm the dataset is well-formed. Full enforcement requires checking all variable names in dataset metadata.

message: Variable name contains characters other than letters, digits, or underscore
description: All ADaM variable names may only contain English letters (A-Z, a-z), underscores (_), or numerals (0-9). No special characters or spaces are allowed. This is a structural metadata rule; STUDYID is used as a representative variable.

message: Character variable value exceeds maximum length of 200 characters (single-dataset check)
description: All ADaM character variable values must be no more than 200 characters in length (single-dataset variant). Uses PARAM as a representative character variable.

message: Character variable value exceeds maximum length of 200 characters
description: All ADaM character variable values must be no more than 200 characters in length. Uses PARAM as a representative character variable. Full coverage requires checking all character variables across all ADaM datasets.

message: COMPLFL has a value other than Y or N
description: COMPLFL may only have a value of Y or N. Null is not allowed for ADSL population flag variables.

message: FASFL has a value other than Y or N
description: FASFL may only have a value of Y or N. Null is not allowed for ADSL population flag variables.

message: ITTFL has a value other than Y or N
description: ITTFL may only have a value of Y or N. Null is not allowed for ADSL population flag variables.

message: PPROTFL has a value other than Y or N
description: PPROTFL may only have a value of Y or N. Null is not allowed for ADSL population flag variables.

message: SAFFL has a value other than Y or N
description: SAFFL may only have a value of Y or N. Null is not allowed for ADSL population flag variables.

message: RANDFL has a value other than Y or N
description: RANDFL may only have a value of Y or N. Null is not allowed for ADSL population flag variables.

message: ENRLFL has a value other than Y or N
description: ENRLFL may only have a value of Y or N. Null is not allowed for ADSL population flag variables.

message: COMPLFN has a value other than 1 or 0
description: COMPLFN may only have a value of 1 or 0. Null is not allowed for ADSL numeric population flag variables.

message: FASFN has a value other than 1 or 0
description: FASFN may only have a value of 1 or 0. Null is not allowed for ADSL numeric population flag variables.

message: ITTFN has a value other than 1 or 0
description: ITTFN may only have a value of 1 or 0. Null is not allowed for ADSL numeric population flag variables.

message: PPROTFN has a value other than 1 or 0
description: PPROTFN may only have a value of 1 or 0. Null is not allowed for ADSL numeric population flag variables.

message: SAFFN has a value other than 1 or 0
description: SAFFN may only have a value of 1 or 0. Null is not allowed for ADSL numeric population flag variables.

message: RANDFN has a value other than 1 or 0
description: RANDFN may only have a value of 1 or 0. Null is not allowed for ADSL numeric population flag variables.

message: ENRLFN has a value other than 1 or 0
description: ENRLFN may only have a value of 1 or 0. Null is not allowed for ADSL numeric population flag variables.

message: *RFL variable (e.g. ABLFL) has a value other than Y or null
description: A variable with a suffix of RFL (record-level flag) may only have a value of Y or null. Uses ABLFL (Analysis Baseline Flag) as a representative *RFL variable in BDS.

message: *PFL variable has a value other than Y or null
description: A variable with a suffix of PFL (parameter-level flag) may only have a value of Y or null. Uses ANL01FL (Analysis 01 Flag) as a representative *FL parameter-level flag in BDS datasets.

message: *RFN variable (e.g. ABLFN) has a value other than 1 or null
description: A variable with a suffix of RFN (record-level flag numeric) may only have a value of 1 or null. Uses ABLFN (Analysis Baseline Flag Numeric) as a representative *RFN variable in BDS datasets.

message: *PFN variable has a value other than 1 or null
description: A variable with a suffix of PFN (parameter-level flag numeric) may only have a value of 1 or null. Uses ANL01FN (Analysis 01 Flag Numeric) as a representative *PFN variable in BDS datasets.

message: Date imputation flag (*DTF) has a value outside controlled terminology (Y/M/D)
description: Date imputation flag variables (*DTF) must have a value of Y (year, month, and day imputed), M (month and day imputed), D (day imputed), or null. Uses ADTF (Analysis Date Imputation Flag) as representative. Single-dataset variant.

message: *DT variable has missing or invalid date format
description: *DT variables must have non-missing SAS Date Format. The date value must be formatted as a valid ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

message: *TM variable has an invalid time format value
description: Variables with a *TM suffix must use a valid SAS time format. Values should conform to ISO 8601 time format HH:MM or HH:MM:SS. Uses AESTM as representative *TM variable.

message: *TM variable is missing (null) when time information should be present
description: *TM suffix variables must have a non-missing value when the corresponding *DTC is populated with a time portion. Uses AESTM as a representative *TM variable.

message: *DT variable contains an invalid or non-ISO 8601 date value
description: Variables with *DT suffix must contain valid complete ISO 8601 dates (YYYY-MM-DD). Uses ADT (Analysis Date) as representative. Partial dates and non-ISO formats are not permitted.

message: *DTM variable contains an invalid or non-ISO 8601 datetime value
description: Variables with *DTM suffix must contain valid ISO 8601 datetime values (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS). Uses ADTM (Analysis Datetime) as representative.

message: *TM and its corresponding *DTM variable have different time values
description: When both time and datetime variables are collected on the same record, the time portion of the datetime variable must equal the time variable. For example, ASTTM must match the time portion of ASTDTM.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: *DT and its corresponding *DTM variable have different date values
description: When both date and datetime variables are collected on the same record, the date portion of the datetime variable must equal the date variable. For example, ASTDT must match the date portion of ASTDTM.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: *DY = 0
description: A variable with a suffix of DY (day) must not equal zero. Variables whose suffix is DY represent study day values, which by convention skip zero (i.e., the day before Day 1 is Day -1, not Day 0).
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Required variable is not present
description: All variables described as Required in the ADaM IG must be included in the dataset (ADSL, BDS, OCCDS, ADAE). This rule covers every core structural variable per the ADaM IG required-variable table.

message: ADSL has no subject-level population flag variable (*FL) populated
description: ADSL must include at least one subject-level population flag variable (ending in FL). This check fires when all of SAFFL, ITTFL, COMPLFL, and ENRLFL are null, suggesting no population flags are present. Full check requires verifying at least one *FL column exists in the dataset structure.

message: Non-unique STUDYID + USUBJID combination
description: The combination of Study Identifier (STUDYID) and Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) must be unique across all ADaM datasets within a study.

message: *DT variable does not appear to be a valid numeric SAS date (should be stored as numeric)
description: *DT analysis date variables must be stored as numeric SAS date values. This rule checks that ADT (Analysis Date) values conform to expected date format, as a proxy for verifying numeric storage. Full enforcement requires checking SAS variable type metadata.

message: *TM variable does not appear to be a valid numeric SAS time (should be stored as numeric)
description: *TM analysis time variables must be stored as numeric SAS time values. This rule checks that AESTM (AE Start Time) values conform to HH:MM:SS format as proxy for numeric storage. Full enforcement requires checking SAS variable type metadata.

message: *DTM variable does not appear to be a valid numeric SAS datetime
description: *DTM analysis datetime variables must be stored as numeric SAS datetime values. Checks ADTM (Analysis Datetime) format as proxy. Full enforcement requires checking SAS variable type metadata.

message: ADSL has no treatment variable (TRT01P or TRT01A) suggesting EX data is not linked
description: If exposure data (EX domain) exists, at least one treatment variable must be present in ADSL (TRT01P or TRT01A). Uses TRT01P/TRT01A as representative treatment variables.

message: No treatment variable (TRTP or TRTA) present in dataset despite exposure data
description: Treatment variables (TRTP or TRTA) should be present if exposure data exists. Uses TRTP/TRTA as representative treatment variables for non-ADSL domains.

message: TRT01AN is populated but corresponding TRT01A is missing
description: When TRT01AN (Actual Treatment for Period 01 Numeric) is present, TRT01A (Actual Treatment for Period 01) must also be present.

message: TRxxPGyN (numeric pooled treatment) is populated but TRxxPGy (character) is missing
description: When TRxxPGyN (Planned Pooled Treatment Numeric) is present, TRxxPGy (Planned Pooled Treatment) must also be present.

message: TRxxAGyN (numeric actual pooled treatment) is populated but TRxxAGy (character) is missing
description: When TRxxAGyN (Actual Pooled Treatment Numeric) is present, TRxxAGy (Actual Pooled Treatment) must also be present.

message: TRT01PN is populated but corresponding TRT01P is missing
description: When TRT01PN (Planned Treatment for Period 01 Numeric) is present, TRT01P (Planned Treatment for Period 01) must also be present.

message: TRT01A is populated but corresponding planned treatment TRT01P is missing
description: When TRT01A (Actual Treatment for Period 01) is present, TRT01P (Planned Treatment for Period 01) must also be present.

message: TRTSDT (Date of First Exposure to Treatment) is null when treatment data exists
description: TRTSDT (Date of First Exposure to Treatment) must be populated in ADSL when the subject received treatment. A null TRTSDT may indicate missing treatment date derivation.

message: TRTEDT is before TRTSDT (last exposure date is earlier than first exposure date)
description: TRTEDT (Date of Last Exposure to Treatment) must be on or after TRTSDT (Date of First Exposure to Treatment).

message: No treatment variable (TRTP or TRTA) is populated in BDS dataset
description: BDS datasets must contain at least one treatment variable (TRTP or TRTA). If both are null, the dataset may be missing required treatment information.

message: TRTPN is populated but TRTP is missing (single-dataset check)
description: Single-dataset variant of ADaM-091. When TRTPN is present, TRTP must also be present within the same dataset.

message: TRTPN is populated but TRTP is missing
description: When TRTPN (Planned Treatment Numeric) is present, TRTP (Planned Treatment) must also be present in BDS datasets.

message: Inconsistent value for TRTPN across TRTP values
description: Within a study, all TRTPN values must be the same for each unique value of TRTP when the primary variable TRTP is populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Inconsistent value for TRTP across TRTPN values
description: Within a study, all TRTP values must be the same for each unique value of TRTPN when the numeric variable TRTPN is populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Inconsistent value for TRTAN across TRTA values
description: Within a study, all TRTAN values must be the same for each unique value of TRTA when the primary variable TRTA is populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Inconsistent value for TRTA across TRTAN values
description: Within a study, all TRTA values must be the same for each unique value of TRTAN when the numeric variable TRTAN is populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: TRTPGyN (numeric pooled planned treatment) is populated but TRTPGy (character) is missing
description: When TRTPG1N (Planned Pooled Treatment 1 Numeric) is present, TRTPG1 (Planned Pooled Treatment 1) must also be present.

message: *STDY is greater than *ENDY
description: Any variable ending in STDY (Start day) must have a value less than or equal to its corresponding ENDY (End day) variable value. ASTDY must be ≤ AENDY.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: TRT01PN is populated but primary variable TRT01P is missing
description: When a numeric secondary variable is populated in ADSL, its corresponding primary character variable must also be populated. Uses TRT01PN/TRT01P as representative. Exceptions apply to TRTPN, TRT01PN, PARAMN, AVALC, BASEC, *LOC, *HIC.

message: Standard secondary variable RACEN is populated but primary variable RACE is missing
description: For standard variable pairs defined in ADaM IG, if the numeric (*N) or character (*C) secondary variable is present, the primary variable must also be present. Uses RACE/RACEN as a representative standard pair defined in ADaM IG ADSL spec.

message: ANLzzFL is populated but ANLzzFN is not populated
description: For Analysis Flag zz (ANLzzFL) and Analysis Flag zz (N) (ANLzzFN) variables, when ANLzzFL is populated, ANLzzFN must also be populated with the same analysis flag number.

message: ADSL has neither TRT01P nor TRT02P (no treatment period variables found)
description: ADSL must include at least one period treatment variable (TRT01P or TRT02P) to indicate the treatment periods. Uses TRT01P/TRT02P as representative.

message: There is no TRTxxP variable in ADSL for every unique xx value of APERIOD
description: The Analysis Period (APERIOD) values will be a number like 01. There must be a corresponding Planned Treatment for Period (TRTxxP) variable in ADSL for every unique APERIOD value.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: *RFL variable (e.g. ABLFL) has a value other than Y, N, or null
description: A variable with a suffix of RFL (record-level flag) may have a value of Y, N, or null in ADaM-IG v1.2. Uses ABLFL as representative *RFL variable.

message: *PFL variable (e.g. ANL01FL) has a value other than Y, N, or null
description: A variable with a suffix of PFL (parameter-level flag) may have a value of Y, N, or null in ADaM-IG v1.2.

message: *RFN variable (e.g. ABLFN) has a value other than 0, 1, or null
description: A variable with a suffix of RFN (record-level numeric flag) may have a value of 0, 1, or null in ADaM-IG v1.2.

message: *PFN variable (e.g. ANL01FN) has a value other than 0, 1, or null
description: A variable with a suffix of PFN (parameter-level numeric flag) may have a value of 0, 1, or null in ADaM-IG v1.2.

message: APERIOD is missing but period timing variable TRT01P is present
description: In ADaM-IG v1.2, APERIOD is conditional: it is required when period-specific timing variables (TRTxxP, APHASEw) or subperiod variables (ASPER) are present in the dataset.

message: AWTARGET is present but AWU (Analysis Window Unit) is missing
description: In ADaM-IG v1.2, AWU (Analysis Window Unit) is the unit for AWTARGET, AWTDIFF, AWLO, and AWHI. When AWTARGET or AWTDIFF is present, AWU must also be present.

message: Secondary variable present without its primary variable (e.g. TRTPN present but TRTP absent)
description: In ADaM-IG v1.2, when any secondary variable (character or numeric) is included in a dataset, the corresponding primary variable must also be included. This generalizes the v1.1 rule for numeric-only pairs.

message: BCHG must be numeric
description: BCHG (Change from Baseline where lower BASE-AVAL is desired) must be a numeric variable when present in a BDS dataset.

message: BCHGCATy must be a character variable
description: BCHGCATy (Change from Baseline Category y, desired direction) must be a character variable when present.

message: BCHGCATy is present but its numeric secondary BCHGCAyN is absent
description: BCHGCAyN (numeric secondary of BCHGCATy) must be present when BCHGCATy is present.

message: There is no TRxxSDT variable in ADSL for every unique xx value of APERIOD
description: The Analysis Period (APERIOD) values will be a number like 01. There must be a corresponding Date of First Exposure in Period (TRxxSDT) variable in ADSL for every unique APERIOD value.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: PBCHG must be numeric
description: PBCHG (Percent Change from Baseline, desired direction) must be a numeric variable when present.

message: PBCHGCAy must be a character variable
description: PBCHGCAy (Percent Change from Baseline Category y) must be a character variable when present.

message: PBCHGCAy is present but its numeric secondary PBCHGCyN is absent
description: PBCHGCyN (numeric secondary of PBCHGCAy) must be present when PBCHGCAy is present.

message: ATOXGRN is present but primary variable ATOXGR is absent
description: ATOXGRN (numeric version of ATOXGR) must be numeric when present and requires ATOXGR to also be present.

message: BTOXGRN is present but primary variable BTOXGR is absent
description: BTOXGRN (numeric version of BTOXGR) must require BTOXGR to also be present.

message: ATOXGRL must be a character toxicity grade variable
description: ATOXGRL (Analysis Toxicity Grade Low) must be a character variable following NCI CTCAE grade conventions for low-direction toxicity.

message: ATOXGRLN is present but primary variable ATOXGRL is absent
description: ATOXGRLN (numeric version of ATOXGRL) requires ATOXGRL to also be present.

message: ATOXGRH must be a character toxicity grade variable
description: ATOXGRH (Analysis Toxicity Grade High) must be a character variable for high-direction bi-directional toxicity.

message: ATOXGRHN is present but primary variable ATOXGRH is absent
description: ATOXGRHN (numeric version of ATOXGRH) requires ATOXGRH to also be present.

message: BTOXGRL must be a character toxicity grade variable
description: BTOXGRL (Baseline Toxicity Grade Low) must be a character variable for baseline low-direction bi-directional toxicity.

message: There is no TRxxEDT variable in ADSL for every unique xx value of APERIOD
description: The Analysis Period (APERIOD) values will be a number like 01. There must be a corresponding Date of Last Exposure in Period (TRxxEDT) variable in ADSL for every unique APERIOD value.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: BTOXGRLN is present but primary variable BTOXGRL is absent
description: BTOXGRLN (numeric version of BTOXGRL) requires BTOXGRL to also be present.

message: BTOXGRH must be a character toxicity grade variable
description: BTOXGRH (Baseline Toxicity Grade High) must be a character variable for baseline high-direction bi-directional toxicity.

message: BTOXGRHN is present but primary variable BTOXGRH is absent
description: BTOXGRHN (numeric version of BTOXGRH) requires BTOXGRH to also be present.

message: ATOXDSCL must be a character variable
description: ATOXDSCL (Analysis Toxicity Description Low) must be a character variable when present.

message: ATOXDSCH must be a character variable
description: ATOXDSCH (Analysis Toxicity Description High) must be a character variable when present.

message: STRATyVN is present but primary variable STRATyV is absent
description: Stratification variables in ADSL must follow the naming convention STRATyV (character) with optional numeric secondary STRATyVN, where y is a positive integer index.

message: Variable has same name as ADSL variable but different values, type, or label
description: A variable in any ADaM dataset that has the same name as an ADSL variable must have the same values, type, and label.

message: SHIFTy variable must be derived from an approved variable pair per ADaM-IG v1.2 Table 3.3.4.1
description: SHIFTy variables may only be based on the change in value of approved variable pairs, which in v1.2 include the bi-directional toxicity pairs (ATOXGRL/BTOXGRL, ATOXGRH/BTOXGRH) in addition to the standard ATOXGR/BTOXGR pair.

message: BASETYPE is null for some records of a PARAMCD where it is non-null for other records
description: In ADaM-IG v1.2, if BASETYPE is used for any PARAM within a dataset, it should be non-null for all records for that PARAM within that dataset (not for all records in the entire dataset as stated in v1.1).

message: PARAMTYP is present; this variable was removed in ADaM-IG v1.2 (informational -- not a conformance violation)
description: PARAMTYP was fully removed from ADaM-IG v1.2. While using PARAMTYP is not a violation of the standard, it is no longer defined in v1.2 and should not be used in new datasets.

message: Inconsistent value for APERIODC across APERIOD values
description: Within a study, all APERIODC values must be the same for each unique value of APERIOD when the primary variable APERIOD is populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: APERIOD is present but APERIODC is not present
description: Within a study, all APERIODC values must be the same for each unique value of APERIOD. Variant B: when APERIOD is populated, APERIODC must also be populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Inconsistent value for APERIOD across APERIODC values
description: Within a study, all APERIOD values must be the same for each unique value of APERIODC when APERIODC is populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: APERIODC is present but APERIOD is not present
description: Within a study, all APERIOD values must be the same for each unique value of APERIODC. Variant B: when APERIODC is populated, APERIOD must also be populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Inconsistent value for AVISITN across AVISIT values
description: Within a study, all AVISITN values must be the same for each unique value of AVISIT when the primary variable AVISIT is populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Inconsistent value for AVISIT across AVISITN values
description: Within a study, all AVISIT values must be the same for each unique value of AVISITN when the numeric variable AVISITN is populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: ARELTM is present, but ARELTMU is not present
description: When ARELTM (Analysis Relative Time) is present, the Anchor Time variable and ARELTMU (Analysis Relative Time unit) must also be included in the dataset.

message: Only one of these variables is populated: ARELTM, ARELTMU
description: If ARELTMU (Analysis Relative Time unit) or ARELTM (Analysis Relative Time) is populated, then both must be populated together.

message: ARELTMU is present, but ARELTM is not present
description: When ARELTM is present, the anchor time variable and ARELTMU must also be included in the dataset. ARELTMU is present but ARELTM is not present.

message: Inconsistent value for ATPT across ATPTN values
description: Within a study, all ATPT values must be the same for each unique value of ATPTN when the numeric variable ATPTN is populated.

message: ATPT is present but ATPTN is not present
description: Within a study, all ATPT values must be the same for each unique value of ATPTN. Variant B: when ATPT is populated, ATPTN must also be populated.

message: Inconsistent value for ATPTN across ATPT values
description: Within a study, all ATPTN values must be the same for each unique value of ATPT when the primary variable ATPT is populated.

message: ATPTN is present but ATPT is not present
description: Within a study, all ATPTN values must be the same for each unique value of ATPT. Variant B: when ATPTN is populated, ATPT must also be populated.

message: Start date is greater than end date
description: Any variable ending in SDT (Start Date) must have a value less than or equal to its corresponding EDT (End Date) variable value.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Start datetime is greater than end datetime
description: Any variable ending in SDTM (Start Datetime) must have a value less than or equal to its corresponding EDTM (End Datetime) variable value.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Inconsistent value for PARAMTYP across PARAMCD values
description: Within a study, all PARAMTYP values must be the same for each unique value of PARAMCD.

message: Inconsistent value for PARCATy across PARAMCD values
description: Within a study, all PARCATy values must be the same for each unique value of PARAMCD when PARCATy is populated. Checks PARCAT1 as representative.

message: Inconsistent PARCATy value for PARAMCD across datasets
description: Within a study, all PARCATy values must be the same for each unique value of PARAMCD across all datasets. Uses PARCAT1 as representative.

message: PARCAT1 is present but PARCAT1N is not present
description: Within a study, all PARCATy values must be the same for each unique value of PARAMCD. Variant B: when PARCAT1 is populated, PARCAT1N must also be populated.

message: Inconsistent value for PARCATyN across PARAMCD values
description: Within a study, all PARCATyN values must be the same for each unique value of PARAMCD when PARCATyN is populated.

message: PARCAT1N is present but PARCAT1 is not present
description: Within a study, all PARCATyN values must be the same for each unique value of PARAMCD. Variant B: when PARCAT1N is populated, PARCAT1 must also be populated.

message: Baseline value BASE populated without corresponding ABLFL=Y record
description: Within a given Subject's PARAMCD, a baseline value (BASE or BASEC) must have a corresponding ABLFL=Y record. This single-dataset variant checks that BASE is not populated without ABLFL being set.

message: BASE or BASEC is present but ABLFL is missing
description: When BASE or BASEC is populated, ABLFL must also be present to identify the baseline record. Without ABLFL, the baseline assignment is ambiguous.

message: BASE has inconsistent values within the same dataset for same subject+parameter
description: Single-dataset variant of ADaM-128. BASE must be consistent within USUBJID+PARAMCD in a single dataset.

message: BASE has inconsistent values across records for the same subject and parameter
description: BASE (Baseline Value) must be consistent across all records for the same subject and parameter. Multiple different BASE values for the same USUBJID and PARAMCD indicate an error.

message: BASEC has inconsistent values for the same subject and parameter
description: BASEC (Baseline Value Character) must be consistent within USUBJID+PARAMCD.

message: BASEC is inconsistent for the same subject+parameter within dataset
description: BASEC must be consistent within USUBJID+PARAMCD in a single BDS dataset.

message: CHG does not equal AVAL - BASE (single-dataset check)
description: Single-dataset variant of ADaM-131. CHG = AVAL - BASE in same dataset.

message: CHG does not equal AVAL - BASE (change from baseline calculation error)
description: When all three are populated, CHG must equal AVAL - BASE within rounding tolerance.

message: R2BASE does not equal AVAL/BASE (single-dataset check)
description: Single-dataset variant: R2BASE = AVAL/BASE when BASE != 0.

message: R2BASE does not equal AVAL / BASE (ratio to baseline calculation error)
description: When all three are populated and BASE != 0, R2BASE = AVAL / BASE.

message: R2BASE is populated when BASE = 0 (division by zero is not valid)
description: When BASE equals 0, R2BASE cannot be computed (division by zero). R2BASE should be null when BASE = 0.

message: CHG/PCHG/R2BASE is populated but BASE is missing (required for derivation)
description: When CHG, PCHG, or R2BASE is present, BASE must also be present since these are all derived from BASE.

message: R2A1LO does not equal AVAL/A1LO (single-dataset check)
description: Single-dataset variant: R2A1LO = AVAL/A1LO when A1LO != 0.

message: R2A1LO does not equal AVAL / A1LO (ratio to lower limit calculation error)
description: R2A1LO must equal AVAL divided by A1LO when A1LO != 0.

message: R2A1LO is populated but A1LO is missing
description: When R2A1LO is present, A1LO must also be present as it is required for the ratio calculation.

message: R2A1LO is populated but AVAL is missing
description: When R2A1LO is present, AVAL must also be present.

message: R2A1LO is populated when A1LO = 0 (division by zero not valid)
description: When A1LO = 0, R2A1LO should be null (division by zero).

message: R2A1HI does not equal AVAL/A1HI (single-dataset check)
description: Single-dataset: R2A1HI = AVAL/A1HI when A1HI != 0.

message: R2A1HI does not equal AVAL / A1HI (ratio to upper limit calculation error)
description: R2A1HI must equal AVAL/A1HI when A1HI != 0.

message: R2A1HI is populated but A1HI is missing
description: When R2A1HI is present, A1HI must also be present.

message: R2A1HI is populated but AVAL is missing
description: When R2A1HI is present, AVAL must be present.

message: R2A1HI is populated when A1HI = 0 (division by zero not valid)
description: When A1HI = 0, R2A1HI should be null.

message: SHIFT1 has inconsistent values for the same subject+parameter
description: SHIFT1 (Shift from Baseline) must be consistent within USUBJID+PARAMCD.

message: CRIT1FL is populated but CRIT1 (criterion definition) is missing
description: When CRIT1FL (Criterion 1 Flag) is populated, CRIT1 (Criterion 1 definition) must also be present to document the criterion text.

message: PARAMCD value does not conform to naming convention (max 8 chars, starts with letter/underscore, A-Z/0-9/_ only)
description: PARAMCD must be at most 8 characters, start with a letter (A-Z) or underscore, and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores. Violations indicate non-conformant parameter codes.

message: PARAMN is not an integer value
description: PARAMN (Numeric Value of Parameter Name) must be a non-missing integer value. Decimal values or non-numeric values are not permitted.

message: ABLFL = Y but BASE does not equal AVAL (baseline value must match analysis value on baseline record)
description: When ABLFL = Y, the record IS the baseline, so BASE must equal AVAL for that record.

message: CRITyFL (CRIT1FL) is present but CRITy (CRIT1) is missing
description: CRITyFL requires corresponding CRITy variable. CRIT1FL requires CRIT1.

message: CRITy (CRIT1) is present but CRITyFL (CRIT1FL) is missing
description: CRITy requires corresponding CRITyFL variable.

message: AWTDIFF is populated but AWTARGET is missing
description: When AWTDIFF is present, AWTARGET must also be present since the difference is calculated relative to the target.

message: AWU is present, but both AWLO and AWHI are not present
description: If Analysis Window Unit (AWU) variable is present, then Analysis Window Lower Bound (AWLO) and Analysis Window Upper Bound (AWHI) must also be present.

message: BTOXGR is populated but ATOXGR is missing
description: When BTOXGR is present, ATOXGR must also be present for toxicity shift analysis.

message: ABLFL=Y but BTOXGR does not equal ATOXGR on baseline record
description: On the baseline record (ABLFL=Y), BTOXGR must equal ATOXGR.

message: ABLFL=Y but BASEC does not equal AVALC (baseline character value mismatch)
description: On baseline record (ABLFL=Y), BASEC must equal AVALC.

message: BNRIND is populated but ANRIND is missing
description: When BNRIND is present, ANRIND must also be present.

message: ABLFL=Y but BNRIND does not equal ANRIND on baseline record
description: On baseline record (ABLFL=Y), BNRIND must equal ANRIND.

message: BTOXGR is inconsistent for the same subject+parameter
description: BTOXGR must be consistent within USUBJID+PARAMCD across all records.

message: CNSR is not a valid non-negative integer
description: CNSR (Censor) must be a non-negative integer. Typically 0 = event, 1 = censored.

message: STARTDT is present, but CNSR is not present
description: If Time-to-Event Origin Date for Subject (STARTDT) variable is present, then Censor (CNSR) must also be present.

message: ABLFL has a value other than Y or null
description: ABLFL (Analysis Baseline Flag) must have a value of Y or null. A value of N is not valid; null indicates the record is not the analysis baseline.

message: ANLzzFL value is not Y or null
description: A variable of form ANLzzFL (analysis record flag) must be Y or null. Uses ANL01FL as a representative variable.

message: Required Variable value is null
description: Unlike SDTM, only some of ADaM Required variables (where Core attribute is Required) must not be null. PARAMCD is a Required variable that must have a non-missing value in all BDS dataset records.

message: Neither AVAL nor AVALC is populated for this BDS record
description: BDS datasets must contain at least one analysis value variable (AVAL for numeric or AVALC for character). If both AVAL and AVALC are null for a record, this may indicate missing analysis values.

message: TRTAGyN (numeric pooled actual treatment) is populated but TRTAGy (character) is missing
description: When TRTAG1N (Actual Pooled Treatment 1 Numeric) is present, TRTAG1 (Actual Pooled Treatment 1) must also be present.

message: For the same USUBJID, the ADSL.AGE != DM.AGE
description: The same subject in ADSL and DM must have the same value for Age (AGE). There must be traceability between ADaM and SDTM. This rule checks AGE is populated in ADSL (cross-dataset consistency requires both ADSL and DM).

message: For the same USUBJID, the ADSL.AGEU != DM.AGEU
description: The same subject in ADSL and DM must have the same value for Age Unit (AGEU). There must be traceability between ADaM and SDTM.

message: For the same USUBJID, the ADSL.SEX != DM.SEX
description: The same subject in ADSL and DM must have the same value for Sex (SEX). There must be traceability between ADaM and SDTM. SEX must be present in ADSL for every subject.

message: For the same USUBJID, the ADSL.RACE != DM.RACE
description: The same subject in ADSL and DM must have the same value for Race (RACE). There must be traceability between ADaM and SDTM. RACE must be present in ADSL for every subject.

message: For the same USUBJID, the ADSL.SUBJID != DM.SUBJID
description: The same subject in ADSL and DM must have the same value for Subject ID (SUBJID). There must be traceability between ADaM and SDTM. SUBJID must be present in ADSL for every subject.

message: For the same USUBJID, the ADSL.SITEID != DM.SITEID
description: The same subject in ADSL and DM must have the same value for Site ID (SITEID). There must be traceability between ADaM and SDTM.

message: For the same USUBJID, the ADSL.ARM != DM.ARM
description: The same subject in ADSL and DM must have the same value for Arm (ARM). There must be traceability between ADaM and SDTM.

message: ABLFN has a value other than 1 or null
description: ABLFN (Analysis Baseline Flag Numeric) must have a value of 1 or null. A value of 0 is not valid; null indicates the record is not the analysis baseline.

message: ANLzzFN value is not 1 or null
description: ANLzzFN (Analyzed Record Flag zz Numeric) must be 1 or null. Uses ANL01FN as a representative variable.

message: CHG != AVAL - BASE
description: When all 3 variables are populated, Change from Baseline (CHG) must equal Analysis Value (AVAL) minus Baseline Value (BASE): CHG = AVAL - BASE.

message: PCHG does not equal 100 * (AVAL - BASE) / BASE (percent change from baseline error)
description: PCHG = 100 * (AVAL - BASE) / BASE when BASE != 0.

message: PCHG is populated when BASE = 0 (percent change undefined when baseline is zero)
description: When BASE = 0, PCHG cannot be calculated (division by zero). PCHG must be null.

message: TRTA and TRTPG1 are both populated but inconsistent (possible treatment deviation)
description: When TRTA (Actual Treatment) and TRTPG1 (Planned Pooled Treatment 1) are both populated, they should be consistent unless dose escalation occurred.

message: TRT01A and TR01P1 are both populated but inconsistent
description: When TRT01A (Actual Treatment Period 01) and TR01P1 (Planned Pooled Treatment Period 01) are both populated, they should be consistent.

message: CNSR is present, but STARTDT is not present
description: When Censor (CNSR) variable is present, the Time-to-Event Origin Date for Subject (STARTDT) must also be present.

message: CNSR is present, but both ADT and ADTM are not present
description: When Censor (CNSR) variable is present, the Time-to-Event Origin Date (ADT) or Datetime (ADTM) must also be present.

message: CNSR=1 but EVNTDESC is not populated
description: When an event is censored (CNSR=1), the Event or Censoring Description (EVNTDESC) must be populated.

message: EVNTDESC and/or CNSDTDSC is present, but CNSR is not present
description: In Time to Event studies, Event or Censoring Description (EVNTDESC) variable must only be present if Censor (CNSR) variable is also present.

message: CNSDTDSC is present, but CNSR is not present
description: In Time to Event studies, Censor Date Description (CNSDTDSC) variable must only be present if Censor (CNSR) variable is also present.

message: *DTF is populated but *DT is not populated
description: If a Date variable is indicated to be imputed by population of an Imputation Flag Variable (*DTF), the corresponding date variable (*DT) must be populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: *TMF is populated but *TM is not populated
description: If a Time variable is indicated to be imputed by population of an Imputation Flag Variable (*TMF), the corresponding time variable (*TM) must be populated.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: ADURU is populated but ADURN is not populated
description: If any of Analysis Duration Units (ADURU) or Analysis Duration (N) (ADURN) is populated, then both must be populated together.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: Treatment flag variable (e.g. TRTEMFL) has a value other than Y or null
description: Treatment flag variables (TRTEMFL, ONTRTFL, PREFL, FUPFL, LVOTFL) must have a value of Y or null. Uses TRTEMFL (Treatment Emergent Analysis Flag) as representative. N is not a valid value for treatment flags.

message: AOCC*FL value is not Y or null
description: 1st Occurrence Flag (AOCC*FL) variable values must be Y or null. Uses AOCCIFL as a representative variable.

message: AOCCzzFL value is not Y or null
description: For additional Flag (AOCCzzFL) variables representing the 1st Occurrence, values must be Y or null.

message: DOSAEONU is present but DOSAEONA is not present
description: If Study Drug Dose at AE Onset Units (DOSAEONU) or Study Drug Dose at AE Onset Amount (DOSAEONA) is present, both must be present together.

message: DOSECUMU is present but DOSECUM is not present
description: If Cumulative Study Drug Dose Unit (DOSECUMU) or Cumulative Study Drug Dose (DOSECUM) is present, both must be present together.

message: AESEVN is populated but ASEVN is not populated
description: Severity/Intensity (N) (AESEVN) and Analysis Severity/Intensity (N) (ASEVN) must be consistent when both are present. When AESEVN is populated, ASEVN must also be populated.

message: ASEVN value is not 1, 2, 3, or null
description: For Analysis Severity/Intensity (N) (ASEVN) variables, values must be 1 (MILD), 2 (MODERATE), 3 (SEVERE), or null.

message: SMQ variable group is incomplete: SMQ01NAM is present but SMQ01CD is missing
description: SMQ (Standardized MedDRA Query) variable groups (SMQzzNAM, SMQzzCD, SMQzzSC) must use a two-digit ordinal suffix 01-99. When SMQ01NAM is present, SMQ01CD must also be present. Uses SMQ01NAM/SMQ01CD as representative pair.

message: CQzzNAM variable has an invalid value (special characters not expected)
description: CQ (Customized MedDRA Query) name variables (CQzzNAM) must use a two-digit ordinal suffix 01-99. Uses CQ01NAM as representative. Values should contain only standard characters.

message: Incomplete SMQ variable group: when any of SMQ01NAM/SMQ01CD/SMQ01SC is populated, all must be populated
description: If any SMQ variable in a group (SMQzzNAM, SMQzzCD, SMQzzSC) is populated, all variables in that group must be populated. Uses SMQ01NAM/SMQ01CD/SMQ01SC as representative group.

message: SMQzzSC value is not BROAD, NARROW, or null
description: Standardized MedDRA Query Scope (SMQzzSC) variable value must be BROAD, NARROW, or null. Uses SMQ01SC as a representative variable.

message: SMQzzSCN value is not 1, 2, or null
description: Standardized MedDRA Query Scope Numeric (SMQzzSCN) variable value must be 1 (BROAD), 2 (NARROW), or null.

message: DECOD is present but DECODORG is not present
description: Original or prior MedDRA coding variables (DECDORGy, etc.) must be present when the corresponding current variable (DECOD, etc.) is present.

message: ADSL dataset label must be Subject-Level Analysis Dataset (metadata rule - verify in Define.xml)
description: The ADSL dataset label must be 'Subject-Level Analysis Dataset'. This is a metadata rule that requires checking the dataset label attribute in Define.xml or SAS dataset metadata. Record-level check verifies dataset is present and populated.

message: ADDL dataset label must be Device-level Analysis Dataset (metadata rule - verify in Define.xml)
description: The ADDL dataset label must be 'Device-level Analysis Dataset'. This is a metadata rule that requires checking the dataset label attribute in Define.xml or SAS dataset metadata.

message: MCRITyML value is not Y or null
description: If Multi-Response Criterion y Evaluation (MCRITyML) flag variable is present, values must be Y or null.

message: MCRITy is present but MCRITyML is not present
description: If Analysis Multi-Response Criterion y (MCRITy) variable is present, MCRITyML must also be present.

message: MCRITyML=Y but MCRITy is not present
description: When Multi-Response Criterion y Evaluation (MCRITyML) = Y, MCRITy must be present.

message: R2A1LO is present but A1LO is missing
description: When R2A1LO is present, A1LO must also be present.

message: R2A1HI is present but A1HI is missing
description: When R2A1HI is present, A1HI must also be present.

message: AyIND value is not L, N, H, or null
description: Analysis Range y Indicator (AyIND) variable values must be L (low), N (normal), H (high), or null. Uses A1IND as a representative variable.

message: BNRIND is inconsistent for the same subject+parameter
description: BNRIND must be consistent within USUBJID+PARAMCD.

message: DOSE or DOSEA is populated but DOSEU (dose units) is missing
description: When DOSE or DOSEA is populated, DOSEU (Dose Units) must also be populated to provide context for the dose value.

message: Missing value for RANDDT when RANDFL is Y
description: Date of Randomization (RANDDT) variable value should be populated for subjects with RANDFL = Y.

message: RANDDT is populated but RANDFL is not Y
description: When RANDDT (Date of Randomization) is populated, RANDFL (Randomized Population Flag) must be Y. A subject with a randomization date must be flagged as randomized.

message: TRT01P is populated but corresponding numeric variable TRT01PN is missing
description: When a character variable (primary) is populated, its corresponding numeric secondary variable must also be populated. Uses TRT01P/TRT01PN as representative pair. Full coverage requires checking all char/num variable pairs.

message: ATOXDSCL is present but neither ATOXGRLN nor ATOXGRL is present
description: If Analysis Toxicity Description Low (ATOXDSCL) variable is present, ATOXGRLN or ATOXGRL must also be present.

message: ATOXDSCH is present but neither ATOXGRHN nor ATOXGRH is present
description: If Analysis Toxicity Description High (ATOXDSCH) variable is present, ATOXGRHN or ATOXGRH must also be present.

message: MCRITyML is present but MCRITy is not present
description: If Multi-Response Criterion y Evaluation (MCRITyML) is present, MCRITy must also be present.

message: MCRITyMN is present but MCRITy is not present
description: If Multi-Response Criterion y Eval (N) (MCRITyMN) is present, MCRITy must also be present.

message: AVISITN is populated but corresponding character variable AVISIT is missing
description: When a numeric secondary variable is populated, its corresponding character primary variable must also be populated. Uses AVISITN/AVISIT as representative pair in BDS.

message: AVISIT is populated but corresponding numeric variable AVISITN is missing
description: When a character primary variable is populated, its corresponding numeric secondary variable must also be populated. Uses AVISIT/AVISITN as representative pair in BDS.

message: PARAMN is populated but PARAM is missing
description: When PARAMN (numeric parameter value) is populated, PARAM (character parameter name) must also be populated. Uses PARAM/PARAMN as representative char/num pair.

message: PARAM is populated but PARAMN is missing
description: When PARAM (character parameter name) is populated, PARAMN (numeric parameter value) must also be populated. Uses PARAM/PARAMN as representative char/num pair in BDS.

message: SHIFT1 is present but BTOXGR is not present
description: If Shift y (SHIFTy) variable is present, the variable pair it is describing (baseline toxicity grade BTOXGR and analysis toxicity grade ATOXGR) must also be present.

message: ASPER is present but APERIOD is not present
description: If Subperiod within Period (ASPER) variable is used in a dataset, Period (APERIOD) must also be present.
classes: BASIC DATA STRUCTURE, OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE

message: AVALCA1N is populated but AVALCA1 is missing
description: When AVALCA1N is present, AVALCA1 must also be present.

message: BASECA1N is populated but BASECA1 is missing
description: When BASECA1N is present, BASECA1 must also be present.

message: CHGCATyN is present but CHGCATy is not present
description: If Change from Baseline Category y (N) (CHGCATyN) variable is used in a dataset, CHGCATy must also be present.

message: PCHGCAyN is present but PCHGCAy is not present
description: If Percent Change from Baseline Category y (N) (PCHGCAyN) variable is used in a dataset, PCHGCAy must also be present.

message: MCRITyMN is present but MCRITyML is not present
description: If Multi-Response Criterion y Eval (N) (MCRITyMN) variable is used in a dataset, MCRITyML must also be present.

message: BCHGCAyN is present but BCHGCAy is not present
description: If Change to Baseline Category y (N) (BCHGCAyN) variable is used in a dataset, BCHGCAy must also be present.

message: PBCHGCyN is present but PBCHGCy is not present
description: If Percent Change to Baseline Category y (N) (PBCHGCyN) variable is used in a dataset, PBCHGCy must also be present.

message: Variable is present, but TRTxxP is not present
description: If any of the subject-level subperiod timing variables (PxxSwSDT, PxxSwEDT, etc.) are present, then the corresponding Planned Treatment for Period (TRTxxP) must also be present.

message: BCHG != AVAL - BASE
description: When all 3 variables are populated, Change to Baseline (BCHG) must equal Analysis Value (AVAL) minus Baseline Value (BASE): BCHG = AVAL - BASE.

message: PBCHG != 100 * (AVAL - BASE) / BASE
description: When all 3 variables are populated and BASE != 0, Percent Change to Baseline (PBCHG) must equal 100 * (AVAL - BASE) / BASE.

message: APHASEN w has a PHSDT != ADSL.PHwSDT
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the Phase Start Date (PHSDT) variable must be present and consistent with ADSL.PHwSDT.

message: APHASEN w has a PHSTM != ADSL.PHwSTM
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the analysis Phase Start Time (PHSTM) variable must be present and consistent with ADSL.PHwSTM.

message: APHASEN w has a PHSDTM != ADSL.PHwSDTM
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the analysis Phase Start Datetime (PHSDTM) variable must be present and consistent with ADSL.PHwSDTM.

message: APHASEN w has a PHEDT != ADSL.PHwEDT
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) is defined, the Phase End Date (PHEDT) variable must be present and consistent with ADSL.PHwEDT.

message: APHASEN w has a PHETM != ADSL.PHwETM
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the Phase End Time (PHETM) variable must be present and consistent with ADSL.PHwETM.

message: APHASEN w has a PHEDTM != ADSL.PHwEDTM
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the Phase End Datetime (PHEDTM) variable must be present and consistent with ADSL.PHwEDTM.

message: TREM01FL is Y but TRTEMFL is not Y (period flag implies overall flag must be Y)
description: When TREM01FL (Treatment Emergent Flag Period 01) is Y, TRTEMFL (overall Treatment Emergent Flag) must also be Y.

message: TRTEM1FL is Y but TRTEMFL is not Y (window flag implies overall flag must be Y)
description: When TRTEM1FL (Treatment Emergent Flag Window 1) is Y, TRTEMFL must also be Y.

message: ONTR01FL is Y but ONTRTFL is not Y
description: When ONTR01FL (On-Treatment Flag Period 01) is Y, ONTRTFL must also be Y.

message: ONTRT1FL is Y but ONTRTFL is not Y
description: When ONTRT1FL (On-Treatment Flag Window 1) is Y, ONTRTFL must also be Y.

message: ONTR01FL is present but ONTRTFL is missing
description: When ONTR01FL (period-specific on-treatment flag) is present, ONTRTFL (overall on-treatment flag) must also be present.

message: ONTRT1FL is present but ONTRTFL is missing
description: When ONTRT1FL (window-specific on-treatment flag) is present, ONTRTFL (overall on-treatment flag) must also be present.

message: NCAXFN value is not 1 or null
description: NCAXFN (PK NCA Exclusion Flag (N)) must be 1 or null. It is a numeric flag that must only have value 1.

message: PKSUMXFN value is not 1 or null
description: PKSUMXFN (PK Summary Exclusion Flag (N)) must be 1 or null. It is a numeric flag that must only have value 1.

message: METABFL value is not Y or null
description: METABFL (Metabolite Flag) must be Y or null.

message: ADOSEDUR is present but neither NDOSEDUR nor DOSEDURU is present
description: When ADOSEDUR is present, NDOSEDUR and/or DOSEDURU must also be included in the dataset.

message: TMPCTDF is populated and ARRLT or NRRLT are not populated
description: If TMPCTDF (Percent Diff. Nominal vs. Actual Time) is populated, both ARRLT (Actual Time Relative to Reference) and NRRLT (Nominal Time Relative to Reference) must also be populated.

message: DOSPCTDF is populated and ARRDOS or NRDOS are not populated
description: If DOSPCTDF (Percent Diff. Nominal vs. Actual Dose) is populated, both ARRDOS (Actual Recorded Dose) and NRDOS (Nominal Recorded Dose) must also be populated.

message: DOSPCTDF is populated but NOMLDOS is missing (required for dose difference calculation)
description: When DOSPCTDF is populated, NOMLDOS must also be present since the percentage difference requires both nominal and actual dose values.

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
message: IEORRES is not equal to 'N' when IECAT equals 'INCLUSION'.
description: Raise an error when IECAT is equal to 'INCLUSION' and IEORRES is not equal to 'N'.

message: SESTDTC is required.
description: Raise an error when SESTDTC is null.

message: TRLOC is present when TRLOC is not included in the TR domain.
description: Raise an error when TRLOC is present.

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
message: ECOCCUR indicates dose was not given, but ECDOSE is not blank or has a value less than or equal to 0
description: When ECOCCUR indicates no dose, then ECDOSE needs to be null or > 0; it cannot be used to indicate a dose wasn't taken.

message: EXTRT is PLACEBO, but EXDOSE is not equal to 0.
description: When EXTRT is PLACEBO, EXDOSE must equal 0

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
cited_guidance: Model v2.0 §Demographics; Model v1.4 §2.2.6; Model v1.7 §Table 2.2.6; SDTM v2.1 §Section 3.2.1 Demographics
message: DTHFL is not "Y" or null
description: Raise an error when DTHFL ^= "Y" and not null

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules; FDA Business Rules
cited_guidance: Model v2.0 §Demographics; Model v1.4 §2.2.6; Model v1.7 §Table 2.2.6.1; SDTM v2.1 §3.2.1 Demographics; FDA §FDAB006
message: DTHDTC is populated but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
description: When Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) in the DM dataset is populated then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; FDA Business Rules
message: SSTRESC in SS dataset is "DEAD", but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
description: When survival status is completed as 'DEAD' in the SS dataset then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; SEND Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
message: ELEMENT variable has a non-null value when ETCD has a value of 'UNPLAN'
description: Verify that ELEMENT value is blank when ETCD is equal to UNPLAN

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
message: ARMCD value length is greater than 20
description: Verify ARMCD value length is <= 20

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
message: IEORRES is not equal to 'Y' when IECAT equals 'EXCLUSION'.
description: Raise an error when IECAT is equal to 'EXCLUSION' and IEORRES is not equal to 'Y'.

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
message: AEOCCUR is present in AE dataset.
description: Raise an error when AEOCCUR exists in AE dataset.

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
message: AESTAT variable is present in AE dataset.
description: Raise an error when AESTAT is present in AE dataset.

conformance_rule_origin: SDTM and SDTMIG Conformance Rules; TIG Conformance Rules
cited_guidance: Model v2.0 §Events|Interventions; Model v1.4 §Model v1.4[2.2.1 (Interventions )]|Model v1.4[2.2.2 (Events)]; Model v1.7 §Model v1.7[2.2.1 (Interventions )]|Model v1.7[2.2.2 (Events)]; SDTM v2.1 §Section 3.1.2 The Events Observation Class|Section 3.1.1 The Interventions Observation Class
message: --OCCUR should only be provided when --PRESP is equal to "Y".

message: RFSTDTC falls after RFENDTC.

description: IETESTCD and IETEST should have a one-to-one relationship.

classes: INTERVENTIONS, EVENTS, FINDINGS, FINDINGS ABOUT, SPECIAL PURPOSE

description: When an Associated Persons non-supplemental qualifier dataset is associated with a split dataset, the dataset name length must be greater than 4 and less than, or equal to, 6.

message: TAETORD values don't match between Subject Visits (SV) and Subject Elements (SE) datasets.

classes: INTERVENTIONS, EVENTS, FINDINGS, FINDINGS ABOUT, SPECIAL PURPOSE

description: All subjects in the Demographics domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product must have at least one corresponding record in the Exposure domain, except for subjects who failed screening, were not fully assigned to an Arm, or did not receive study treatment.

message: A subject has a no record in EX but is not populated ARMNRS while participating in an interventional study
description: All subjects that have no record in the Exposure domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product should have ARMNRS populated.

message: A subject has a record in DM but not in EX while participating in an interventional study
description: All subjects in the Demographics domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product must have at least one corresponding record in the Exposure domain, except for subjects who failed screening, were not fully assigned to an Arm, or did not receive study treatment.

description: Normal Range Upper Limit-Original Units (--ORNRHI) is greater than the Normal Range Lower Limit-Original Units (--ORNRLO).

description: Disposition date time (DSSTDTC) for DEATH record in the DS dataset should be equal to the Date of Death (DTHDTC) in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

description: There should be only one record with a baseline flag and non missing character standard result value having the same --TESTCD, --CAT, --SCAT, --SPEC, --METHOD values.

message: There are multiple records per assigned last observation before exposure flag (--LOBXFL).
description: There should be only one record with a last observation before exposure flag and non missing character standard result value having the same --TESTCD, --CAT, --SCAT, --SPEC, --METHOD values.

The only possible exceptions for SDTMIG v3.2 (and earlier) are Screen Failures (ARMCD=SCRNFAIL) and Not Assigned Treatment (ARMCD=NOTASSGN) subjects, or subjects with ARMCD=null.  There are no exceptions for SEND.

source_document: FDA Study Data Validator Rules v1.6
message: No Exposure record found for subject
description: All Demographics (DM) subjects (USUBJID) participating in a study that includes investigational product should have at least one record in the Exposure (EX) domain, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL'), were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN'), or did not receive study treatment (ACTARMCD = 'NOTTRT').

source_document: FDA Study Data Validator Rules v1.6

message: Invalid ARM/ARMCD
description: The combination of Description of Planned Arm (ARM) and Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) values must match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL') or were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN').

source_document: FDA Study Data Validator Rules v1.6

description: Reference record defined by Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN), Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID), Identifying Variable (IDVAR) and Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) must exist in the target Domain.

source_document: FDA Study Data Validator Rules v1.6
message: EX record is present, when subject is not assigned to an arm
description: Subjects that are not assigned to an Arm (ARMCD='NOTASSGN') or are screen failures (ARMCD='SCRNFAIL'), or ARM=null, should not have any Exposure records. Run-in records (EPOCH='RUN-IN') are excluded from firing for this validation rule.

source_document: FDA Study Data Validator Rules v1.6
message: AE start date is after the latest Disposition date
description: Start Date/Time of Adverse Event (AESTDTC) should be less than or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC).

source_document: FDA Study Data Validator Rules v1.6

description: I/E Criterion Original Result (IEORRES) and I/E Criterion Result in Std Format (IESTRESC) should have the same value.

description: SAS v5 export format has a limitation on variables length up to 200 characters. If collected value was more than 200 characters, then SUPPQUAL dataset should be used to store additional 200+ characters. Variable QNAM should have --TERM1, ---TERM2, etc. values for those records. Value splitting should be performed between words or numbers. See SDTM IG #4.1.5.3.2 for details. This risk-assessment check is triggered based on assumption that if original value was truncated, then the actual data value length is exactly 200 characters.

source_document: FDA Study Data Validator Rules v1.6
message: Missing --PRESP variable, when --OCCUR variable is present
description: Pre-specified (--PRESP) variable should be included into dataset, when Occurrence (--OCCUR) variable is present. (--PRESP/Events) Used to indicate whether the event describe by --TERM was pre-specified on a CRF.  Value is Y for pre-specified events, null for spontaneously reported events. (--PRESP/Interventions) Used when a specific intervention is pre-specified on a CRF. Values should be 'Y' or null. (--OCCUR) Used to record whether a pre-specified event occurred when information about the occurrence of a specific event is solicited.

description: Expected variables may contain some null values, but in most cases will not contain null values for every record. When no data has been collected for an Expected variable, however, a null column must still be included in the dataset, and a comment must be included in the define.xml to state that data was not collected.
