description: Variables with an "C" suffix are considered secondary variables linked to a primary variable with the same name, minus the suffix. The primary variable must be present in the dataset to include its corresponding secondary variable. Clinical Programmer to ensure primary and secondary variables are aligned accordingly.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: The combination of STUDYID and USUBJID value from SDTM DM does not exist in ADSL
description: The combination of Study Identifier (STUDYID) and Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) values in ADaM Analysis Subject Level (ADSL) dataset should be populated by values of the same variables from the study SDTM Demographics (DM) domain.

message: Illegal PARAMCD value
description: PARAMCD must be no more than 8 characters, start with an uppercase letter or underscore, and contain only uppercase letters, digits, and underscores.

message: ABLFL = Y, but BNRIND != ANRIND
description: When a record is flagged as the baseline (ABLFL = "Y"), the baseline normal range indicator (BNRIND) must equal the analysis normal range indicator (ANRIND). Both variables must be non-missing for the check to apply.

message: Multiple baseline records exist for a unique USUBJID, PARAMCD, BASETYPE
description: For a unique combination of USUBJID, PARAMCD, and BASETYPE, only one record may be flagged as the actual baseline (ABLFL = "Y").

message: Value not in spec codelist (value not in Terms)
description: A dataset value is not one of the Terms listed for the variable's referenced codelist. Fires only after HRL-CL-002 confirms the variable and codelist data types match; otherwise the mismatch is reported by HRL-CL-002 instead.

message: Codelist type mismatch between variable and referenced codelist
description: A variable references a codelist whose data type does not match the variable's Data Type (e.g. a character variable pointing at an integer codelist or vice versa). Prevents HRL-CL-001 from firing with a misleading "value not in terms" message when the underlying problem is that the codelist reference itself is wrong.

message: Paired num/char variables share a codelist or use wrong codelist types
description: Paired numeric/character variables (e.g. AGEGR1 and AGEGR1N, TRT01P and TRT01PN, SEX and SEXN) must reference two distinct codelists — a text codelist for the character variable whose Terms are the decoded strings, and an integer codelist for the numeric companion whose Terms are the codes and whose Decoded Value column carries the matching strings. Sharing a single codelist between the pair guarantees that one of the two variables' values will not appear in the codelist's Terms column.

message: Predecessor variable does not inherit its source's codelist
description: When Origin = Predecessor and the Predecessor column points at a specific source variable (pattern "<DS>.<VAR>"), the row's Codelist must equal the source variable's Codelist whenever the source has one. Enforces codelist inheritance so derived predecessor copies cannot silently drift onto a different (or stray) codelist ID.

message: Variable references a codelist ID that does not exist on the Codelists sheet
description: Every non-empty Codelist reference on the Variables sheet must exist as an ID on the Codelists sheet. Catches stray or leaked identifiers (e.g. Analysis Display or Document IDs accidentally placed in the Codelist column) that would otherwise surface as mysterious HRL-CL-001 "empty codelist" failures.

message: Dataset label mismatch vs spec
description: The dataset label assigned in the data does not match the dataset label defined in the specification. Dataset labels must match exactly.

source_document: Herald R Package (spec-driven key uniqueness check)
message: Duplicate row for spec-declared composite key
description: Rows in any dataset must form a unique tuple on the spec-declared key variables (Datasets sheet, Key Variables column). Every row whose composite-key tuple matches another row in the same dataset is flagged as a duplicate. Key variables are resolved at runtime from the spec; when the spec under-declares the key (e.g. a BDS dataset missing ATPTN / ADTM from its declared key), real duplicates surface here and point the reviewer at the spec gap. If any declared key is absent from the dataset, the check is inconclusive and HRL-KEY-002 fires instead.

source_document: Herald R Package (spec-driven key presence check)
message: Key variable '{variable}' declared in spec but missing from data
description: Every key variable declared in the spec (Datasets sheet, Key Variables column) must be present in the dataset. One finding per missing key column, reported with sensitivity Dataset. Complements HRL-KEY-001, which assumes all declared keys are present before checking for duplicate composite rows. HRL-KEY-002 catches the upstream case where the spec says a key exists but the data doesn't carry it, e.g. ADVS declared keys include ATPTN but the .xpt shipped without ATPTN.

message: Variable label mismatch vs spec
description: The label assigned to a variable in the dataset does not match the label defined in the specification. Labels must match exactly per submission requirements.

message: Character value exceeds spec byte length
description: A character variable contains a value whose byte length exceeds the maximum length declared in the specification. Truncation may occur during XPT export.

message: Invalid Codelist Name
description: Codelist Name should not contain 2 or more spaces in sequence.

message: Name is required for each Codelist
description: Name is required for each Codelist.

message: Invalid Data Type value for Codelist
description: The Data Type attribute for Codelist must have a value of 'text', 'integer', 'float', 'datetime', 'date', 'time', 'partialDate', 'partialTime', 'partialDatetime', 'incompleteDatetime', 'durationDatetime', 'intervalDatetime', 'URI', or 'boolean'.

message: Invalid Recommended Codelist value
description: If populated, Recommended Codelist must be a valid Codelist ID within the CT referenced on the Properties tab of the spec under the field labelled Recommended Terminology.

message: Name is required for each Event
description: A Name value is required for each Event.  Name is a required attribute for the StudyEventDef element. Events are represented in ODM as StudyEventDef elements.

message: Invalid Type value
description: Type must either be Scheduled, Unscheduled, or Common.

message: Invalid Repeating value
description: Repeating must have a value of 'Yes' or 'No'.

message: Order value must be a positive integer
description: Order values should be positive numbers only (integers), no letters or special symbols.

message: Order must contain a value
description: Order should contain a value (i.e., be non-null).

message: Invalid Mandatory value
description: Mandatory must have a value of 'Yes' or 'No'.

message: Invalid use of Length
description: Length value must be empty when Data Type is not integer, float, or text.

message: Missing Length value
description: The Length attribute is required when DataType is text.

message: Invalid integer value
description: If Length is populated, value must follow the positive integer format.

message: Referenced Codelist is missing
description: Referenced Codelist must first be defined on Codelists tab.

message: Referenced Measurement Unit is missing
description: Referenced Measurement Units must first be defined on Units tab.

message: Invalid Term (Display Term)
description: Term (Display Term) should not contain 2 or more spaces in sequence.

message: Invalid Display Term value for Codelist referenced by QNAM
description: Codelists associated with a QNAM should have Terms less than or equal to 8 characters in length to adhere to SAS XPTV5 requirements.

message: Invalid Display Term value for Codelist referenced by QLABEL
description: Codelists associated with a QLABEL should have Terms less than or equal to 40 characters in length to adhere to SAS XPTV5 requirements.

message: Codelist is required for each Term
description: A value is required for Codelist for each Term. Terms must be associated to a Codelist.

message: Invalid Codelist value for Term
description: Codelist value must be a valid Codelist defined on the Codelists tab.

message: Invalid Recommended Term value
description: If populated, Recommended Term must be a valid term within the Codelist ID of the CT referenced on the Properties tab of the spec under the field labelled Recommended Terminology.

message: Unit is required for each measurement unit
description: Unit is required for each measurement unit.

message: Invalid SDTM Target value
description: SDTM Target should reference a variable in the domain specified in the SDTM Target Domains column on the Forms tab.

message: Invalid syntax for SDTM Target
description: SDTM Target should reference a variable in the domain specified in the SDTM Target Domains column on the Forms tab. The structure of this column needs to be in the form of DATASET.VARIABLE.

message: Codelist is empty
description: Codelist must have at least one item.

message: Codelist Name must not contain carriage returns
description: Codelist Name should not contain any carriage returns.

message: Term must not contain carriage returns
description: Term (Display Term) should not contain any carriage returns.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Invalid RDOMAIN
description: Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN) must have a valid value of Domains included in the study data. This RELREC-specific version of the rule allows for the exception provided in the SDTMIG stating "RDOMAIN may contain up to 4 characters to effectively describe the relationship between the CE parent records and the FACE child records."

message: Dataset is greater than 5 GB in size
description: Datasets greater than 5 gigabytes (GB) in size should be split into smaller datasets no larger than 5 GB.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Missing EPOCH value when collection date is provided
description: Variables requested by the relevant regulatory agency in policy documents (e.g., EPOCH) should be included in the dataset and populated. EPOCH variable should be populated for records where Collection Date of Observation (--DTC) is collected as complete date and this date is not before Subject Informed Consent Date (RFICDTC).

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: No Last Observation Before Exposure flag record in Domain for subject
description: All subjects should have at least one Last Observation Before Exposure observation (--LOBXFL = 'Y') in EG, LB, LC, MB, MS, PC and VS domains, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMNRS = 'SCREEN FAILURE'), or were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMNRS = 'NOT ASSIGNED'), or were not treated (ARMNRS = 'ASSIGNED, NOT TREATED').

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Invalid referenced record
description: Reference record defined by Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN), Associated Person Identifier (APID), Identifying Variable (IDVAR) and Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) must exist in the target domain defined by Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN).

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: duplicate records
description: All SQAPxxxx Domains records are associated with a single parent record and must have a unique combination of Study Identifier (STUDYID), Associated Person (APID), Identifying Variable (IDVAR), Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) and Qualifier Variable Name (QNAM) variable value. For all AP SUPPQUAL (SQAPxxxx) domain records, all the QNAM variable values should be unique for each parent record.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: No --LOBXFL variable in custom Findings domain
description: Last Observation Before Exposure Flag (--LOBXFL) variable should be present in all custom Findings domains.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Missing LC domain when LB domain is present
description: Per FDA Study Data Technical Conformance Guide, an additional custom domain called LC structured identically to LB should contain conventional units in --STRESU for the results in conventional units in the --STRESC and --STRESN variables.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Missing TSVAL when TSPARMCD=SSTDTC
description: Study Start Date must be populated in TS dataset. TSPARMCD="SSTDTC", TSVAL != null.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Cross-domain SDTM QC Checks (2026-04)
message: AE start date precedes earliest exposure date for subject
description: Adverse event start date (AESTDTC) should not precede the earliest exposure start date (EXSTDTC) for the same subject, unless the AE is pre-treatment.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Cross-domain SDTM QC Checks (2026-04)
message: RFSTDTC does not match earliest EXSTDTC for subject
description: DM.RFSTDTC (reference start date) should equal the earliest EX.EXSTDTC (first exposure start date) for the same subject. Mismatches indicate inconsistent study anchoring.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Cross-domain SDTM QC Checks (2026-04)
message: Subject has DTHFL=Y but no DS record with DSDECOD containing DEATH
description: When DM.DTHFL = 'Y' (subject died), there should be a corresponding DS record with DSDECOD containing 'DEATH'. Missing death disposition indicates incomplete regulatory documentation.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Cross-domain SDTM QC Checks (2026-04)
message: RELREC references non-existent record (broken link)
description: RELREC link integrity: every RELREC record must reference a valid record in the domain specified by RDOMAIN. The combination of RDOMAIN, IDVAR, and IDVARVAL must resolve to an existing record in the referenced domain.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Cross-domain SDTM QC Checks (2026-04)
message: LB record date outside study reference window (RFSTDTC to RFENDTC)
description: Lab collection date (LBDTC) should fall within the subject's study window defined by DM.RFSTDTC and DM.RFENDTC. Records outside this window may indicate data collection errors or unscheduled assessments that need documentation.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — 7 Mistakes in LB Unit Conversion (2026-04)
message: Multiple distinct LBSTRESU values found for the same LBTESTCD
description: LBSTRESU (standard unit) must be consistent within each LBTESTCD. A single lab test code should not have multiple distinct standard units across records in the same dataset.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — 7 Mistakes in LB Unit Conversion (2026-04)
message: LBSTRESN populated when LBSTRESC is qualitative (should be null)
description: When LBSTRESC contains a qualitative result (POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, NORMAL, ABNORMAL, TRACE), LBSTRESN must be null. Qualitative results cannot have a meaningful numeric representation.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — 7 Mistakes in LB Unit Conversion (2026-04)
message: LBORRES contains inequality operator but LBSTRESC does not preserve it
description: When LBORRES contains an inequality operator (< > <= >=), LBSTRESC must also preserve the operator. Stripping the operator loses clinically meaningful limit-of-detection information.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — 7 Mistakes in LB Unit Conversion (2026-04)
message: LBSTNRLO appears unconverted (equals LBORNRLO) despite LBORRESU != LBSTRESU; reference range may not be in standard units
description: When LBORRESU differs from LBSTRESU (unit conversion occurred), LBSTNRLO and LBSTNRHI must also be converted to the standard unit. Reference ranges left in the original unit while LBSTRESN is in the standard unit make LBNRIND derivation incorrect.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Non-Printable Characters in AETERM/MHTERM (2025-01)
message: Non-printable control character detected in character variable
description: Character variables in SDTM datasets must not contain non-printable ASCII control characters (hex 00-1F, 7F). These characters are invisible, cause XPT transport issues, and indicate data import contamination.

message: QNAM exceeds 8-character limit
description: QNAM values in SUPPQUAL datasets must not exceed 8 characters. QNAM follows SAS V5 naming rules (max 8 chars, starts with letter or underscore, alphanumeric/underscore only, uppercase).
domains: SUPPAE, SUPPCM, SUPPLB, SUPPDS, SUPPDM, SUPPEX, SUPPVS, SUPPMH

source_document: StudySAS Blog — SDTM IG 3.4 SUPPDS Assumptions (2026-04)
message: Population flag found in SUPPQUAL (should be ADaM only)
description: Population flag variables (COMPLT, FULLSET, ITT, PPROT, SAFETY) must not appear as QNAM values in SUPPQUAL datasets. Population flags are ADaM-only derivations and do not belong in SDTM, including supplemental qualifiers.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Analysis Required variable not found
description: These variables assist regulatory review and analysis and must be included in the dataset.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Both --STDTC and --STDY values are missing
description: At least one of Start Date/Time (--STDTC) or Start Day of Event or Exposure (--STDY) variables values must be populated for Analysis.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Missing PP dataset
description: Pharmacokinetic Parameters (PP) dataset should be included in every submission with pharmacokinetics observations.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: Neither AESEV nor AETOXGR is populated
description: Either Severity/Intensity (AESEV) or Standard Toxicity Grade (AETOXGR) variables values must be populated.

source_document: Herald-original (gap analysis vs P21 Community catalog)
message: LBSTRESN is populated, but LBSTNRHI is not populated
description: For laboratory tests where normal ranges are applicable, if a numeric result is provided (LBSTRESN is populated), a normal range high should be provided (LBSTNRHI).

message: Variable type mismatch (char vs numeric)
description: The storage type of a variable in the dataset (character or numeric) does not match the data type declared in the specification.

message: Variable in spec but missing from data
description: A variable present in the specification is missing from the dataset. This check ensures every declared variable appears in the submitted data.

message: Variable in data but not in spec
description: A variable present in the dataset is not declared in the specification. This check identifies undocumented variables that appear in submitted data.

message: Common variable '{variable}' is missing from dataset '{dataset}'
description: Variables flagged as Common (common = Yes) in the specification must be present in every submitted dataset. Common variables are shared identifiers expected across all domains (e.g. STUDYID, USUBJID).

authority: Herald-relay (pending FDA Validator v1.7 upstream source)
message: Duplicate APID in APDM within STUDYID
description: In the Associated Persons Demographics (APDM) domain, there should only be one record per associated person (Associated Persons Identifier APID). Duplicate APID values within APDM indicate a data integrity issue.

message: Invalid length of attributes in Define.xml
description: FDA's Clinical Trial Repository (CTR) software currently has a maximum length of 1000 characters for data attributes in Define.xml.

message: Data Type/Assigned Value mismatch
description: The value provided in Assigned Value must match the Data Type of the variable.

message: Length/Assigned Value mismatch
description: The length of the value provided in Assigned Value must be less than or equal to the variable length.

message: Assigned value not found in codelist
description: When a variable or value level record is subject to controlled terminology, the Assigned Value must be populated with a term from its associated codelist.

message: Invalid Data Type for --DTC/--DUR variable
description: SEND/SDTM variables that represent ISO 8601 formatted date/times/datetimes (--DTC and --DUR) should have a Data Type value of 'datetime', 'date', 'time', 'partialDate', 'partialTime', 'partialDatetime', 'incompleteDatetime', or 'durationDatetime'. In Define-XML 2.1, 'intervalDatetime' is also a valid Data Type. A Data Type value of 'text' is invalid.

message: Check Value not found in Codelist
description: A value found in a Where Clause is not found in the defined Codelist within the linked Terminology.

message: Coded and Decoded values do not have the same C-Code
description: Paired variables such as TEST/TESTCD must be populated using terms with the same Term Code (C-Code) value.

message: ARM metadata included in non ADaM define.xml
description: Analysis Results Metadata was developed specifically for ADaM and therefore should not be included with SDTM or SEND defines. Analysis Results Metadata inclusion is indicated by the presence of the arm:AnalysisResultDisplays element.

message: Duplicate arm:ResultDisplay OID
description: The OID for an arm:ResultDisplay element must be unique within the arm:AnalysisResultDisplays element.

message: Duplicate arm:ResultDisplay Names
description: The name of an arm:ResultDisplay should uniquely identify the display in the report (e.g., Table or Figure number).

message: Missing Required Description Element
description: A Description element must be included in each arm:ResultDisplay.

message: Duplicate arm:AnalysisResult OID
description: The OID for an arm:AnalysisResult must be unique within a arm:ResultDisplay.

message: Missing required ParameterOID
description: ParameterOID is required when the analysis result is based on specific parameter(s) from a BDS structured dataset.

message: Improper use of ParameterOID
description: When ParameterOID is included in a arm:AnalysisResult, then at least one of the children arm:AnalysisDataset elements must be a BDS and the ParameterOID must reference a PARAMCD variable for that dataset.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Define.xml for SUPPQUAL QNAM-Level Metadata (2026-04)
message: QNAM value in dataset has no corresponding WhereClauseDef in define.xml
description: Every unique QNAM value in a SUPPQUAL dataset must have a corresponding WhereClauseDef entry in define.xml. Missing VLM entries mean the reviewer has no metadata for that supplemental qualifier.

message: Variable has Origin='Derived' but no MethodRef (derivation undocumented)
description: Variables with Origin Type = 'Derived' must have a corresponding MethodRef pointing to a MethodDef that documents the derivation logic. A derived variable without a method is not reproducible from metadata alone.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Define.xml for SUPPQUAL QNAM-Level Metadata (2026-04)
message: WhereClauseDef uses SoftHard='Hard' (should be 'Soft')
description: WhereClauseDef elements in define.xml ValueListDef must use SoftHard='Soft', not 'Hard'. Hard constraints incorrectly imply validation failure semantics rather than data subsetting semantics.

source_document: StudySAS Blog — Define.xml for SUPPQUAL QNAM-Level Metadata (2026-04)
message: Controlled-terminology QNAM in VLM lacks CodeListRef
description: SUPPQUAL VLM ItemDefs with controlled terminology values must have a CodeListRef. Free-text QNAMs must NOT have a CodeListRef. Mismatch between value type and codelist presence causes P21 findings.

source_document: Herald-original (Define-XML origin integrity); CDISC Define-XML v2.1 § 4.3.2
message: Origin='Predecessor' but Source is populated. Leave Source null for Predecessor origins.
description: When a Variables-sheet row has Origin='Predecessor', the Source column must be null. Source is mandated only when Origin is not Predecessor (see HRL-DD-056); populating it alongside a Predecessor origin indicates inconsistent metadata. Counterpart to HRL-DD-061 (which covers the Predecessor-field-present requirement).

source_document: Herald-original (Define-XML origin integrity); CDISC Define-XML v2.1 § 5.3.9.2
message: Origin='Predecessor' but a Method is assigned. Methods belong only to Derived origins.
description: When a Variables-sheet row has Origin='Predecessor', the Method column must be null. Predecessor origins inherit from another dataset and should not carry a derivation method. Counterpart to HRL-DD-059 (which requires Method when Origin='Derived').

source_document: Herald-original (Define-XML origin integrity); CDISC Define-XML v2.1 § 4.3.2
message: Origin='Derived' but Predecessor is populated. Derived variables document their source in Method, not Predecessor.
description: When a Variables-sheet row has Origin='Derived', the Predecessor column must be null. A derived variable has no single source record; the derivation is documented in Method, not Predecessor. Counterpart to HRL-DD-059 (which requires Method when Origin='Derived').

source_document: Herald-original (Define-XML origin integrity); CDISC Define-XML v2.1 § 4.3.2
message: Origin='Assigned' but Predecessor is populated. Assigned values have no predecessor record.
description: When a Variables-sheet row has Origin='Assigned', the Predecessor column must be null. Assigned values come from a fixed sponsor assignment (e.g. DOMAIN, STUDYID, study-level constants), not from a source-record predecessor.

source_document: Herald-original (Define-XML origin integrity); CDISC Define-XML v2.1 § 5.3.9.2
message: Origin='Assigned' but a Method is set. Assigned values are documented by their Assigned Value, not by a MethodDef.
description: When a Variables-sheet row has Origin='Assigned', the Method column must be null. Assigned values are fixed sponsor assignments, not derivations; they do not carry an associated MethodDef.

cited_guidance: StudyName -- Required. Cardinality: Exactly one. A short name assigned to the study by the sponsor.
message: StudyName is missing or empty in the Define sheet. This is required for all Define-XML documents.
description: StudyName is required and must be non-empty in the Define sheet.

cited_guidance: StudyDescription -- Required. Cardinality: Exactly one. A text description of the contents of the Study.
message: StudyDescription is missing or empty in the Define sheet. This is required for all Define-XML documents.
description: StudyDescription is required and must be non-empty in the Define sheet.

cited_guidance: ProtocolName -- Required. Cardinality: Exactly one. A protocol name or number assigned to the study.
message: ProtocolName is missing or empty in the Define sheet. This is required for all Define-XML documents.
description: ProtocolName is required and must be non-empty in the Define sheet.

cited_guidance: def:DefineVersion -- Required. '2.1.n'. Version of Define-XML to which the file conforms.
message: DefineVersion does not match '2.1.x'. Define-XML v2.1 requires def:DefineVersion starting with '2.1'.
description: DefineVersion must start with '2.1' to conform to Define-XML v2.1.

message: def:Context has an invalid value. Must be 'Submission' or 'Other'.
description: def:Context must be 'Submission' or 'Other' when specified.

cited_guidance: Name -- Required. Short description for the ItemGroup.
message: Dataset name is missing. Each row in the Datasets sheet must have a dataset name.
description: Dataset name is required in the Datasets sheet.

cited_guidance: Description -- Required for all ItemGroupDef in the context of a regulatory submission.
message: Dataset label is missing. Description is required for all ItemGroupDef in regulatory submissions.
description: Dataset label (Description) is required for regulatory submissions.

cited_guidance: def:Class -- Conditional. Required when the ItemGroupDef describes a dataset that follows SDTM, SEND, or ADaM.
message: Class is missing for a dataset that references a standard. def:Class is required when dataset follows SDTM, SEND, or ADaM.
description: Class is required for datasets following SDTM, SEND, or ADaM standards.

cited_guidance: Name -- Required. Text must follow CDISC Controlled Terminology for General Observation Class.
message: Class value is not a valid CDISC General Observation Class. Class is case-sensitive and controlled by a non-extensible codelist.
description: Class name must be a valid CDISC Controlled Terminology value for General Observation Class.

cited_guidance: def:SubClass -- Name must follow CDISC Controlled Terminology for SubClass.
message: SubClass value is not valid. Allowable values are 'TIME-TO-EVENT' and 'ADVERSE EVENT'.
description: SubClass must be a valid CDISC Controlled Terminology value when provided.

cited_guidance: def:Structure -- Required. Description of the level of detail represented by individual records in the dataset.
message: Structure description is missing. def:Structure is required for all datasets.
description: Structure description is required for all datasets.

cited_guidance: Allowable Names: SDTMIG, SDTMIG-MD, SDTMIG-AP, SDTMIG-PGx, SENDIG, SENDIG-DART, ADaMIG.
message: Standard does not match expected format '<Name> <Version>'. Must use allowable standard names (SDTMIG, ADaMIG, SENDIG, etc.).
description: Standard column must use a recognized standard name and version format.

cited_guidance: Type IG -- Allowable Names: SDTMIG, SDTMIG-MD, SDTMIG-AP, SDTMIG-PGx, SENDIG, SENDIG-DART, ADaMIG.
message: Standard name is not one of the allowable CDISC standard names.
description: Standard name component must be one of the CDISC allowable standard names.

cited_guidance: Name: SDTMIG. Allowable Versions: 3.1.2, 3.2, 3.3. Define-XML v2.1 supports SDTMIG v3.1.2 and higher.
message: SDTMIG version is not allowable. Must be one of: 3.1.2, 3.2, 3.3, 3.4.
description: SDTMIG version must be one of the allowable versions: 3.1.2, 3.2, 3.3, 3.4.

cited_guidance: Define-XML v2.1 can be used to transmit metadata for ADaMIG v1.0 and higher.
message: ADaMIG version is not allowable. Must be one of: 1.0, 1.1, 1.2, 1.3.
description: ADaMIG version must be one of the allowable versions: 1.0, 1.1, 1.2, 1.3.

cited_guidance: Define-XML v2.1 can be used to transmit metadata for SENDIG v3.0 and higher.
message: SENDIG version is not allowable. Must be one of: 3.0, 3.1, 3.1.1.
description: SENDIG version must be one of the allowable versions: 3.0, 3.1, 3.1.1.

cited_guidance: KeySequence -- Conditional. Each variable that is part of the dataset key must have a KeySequence attribute. In the context of a regulatory submission, a key must be provided for each dataset.
message: Key Variables is missing. In regulatory submissions, a key must be provided for each dataset.
description: Key Variables must be populated for all datasets in regulatory submissions.

message: Repeating has an invalid value. Must be 'Yes' or 'No'.
description: Repeating must be 'Yes' or 'No'.

cited_guidance: Business Rule: When IsReferenceData='Yes', set Repeating='No'.
message: Repeating is not 'No' but Reference Data is 'Yes'. When IsReferenceData='Yes', Repeating must be 'No'.
description: When Reference Data is 'Yes', Repeating must be 'No'.

cited_guidance: Purpose -- Required. 'Tabulation', 'Analysis'. For SDTM and SEND, use Tabulation. For ADaM, use Analysis.
message: Purpose has an invalid value. Must be 'Tabulation' (SDTM/SEND) or 'Analysis' (ADaM).
description: Purpose must be 'Tabulation' for SDTM/SEND or 'Analysis' for ADaM.

cited_guidance: Name -- Required. Dataset Variable name or Variable Value Name.
message: Variable name is missing. Each row in the Variables sheet must have a variable name.
description: Variable name is required in the Variables sheet.

cited_guidance: Description -- Required for all ItemDef elements corresponding to Variable definitions in the context of a regulatory submission.
message: Variable label is missing. Description is required for all ItemDef corresponding to Variable definitions in regulatory submissions.
description: Variable label is required for regulatory submissions.

cited_guidance: DataType -- Required. See Section 4.3.1, Data Type Considerations, for a list of valid Define-XML DataType values.
message: Data Type is not a valid Define-XML type. Allowable values: text, integer, float, date, datetime, time, partialDate, partialTime, partialDatetime, incompleteDatetime, durationDatetime, intervalDatetime.
description: Data Type must be a valid Define-XML data type.

cited_guidance: Length -- Conditional. Required if DataType is 'Text', 'Integer', or 'Float'.
message: Length is missing but required when Data Type is text, integer, or float.
description: Length is required when Data Type is text, integer, or float.

cited_guidance: Length should be present only when DataType is 'Text', 'Integer', or 'Float'.
message: Length should not be provided when Data Type is a date/time type. Length is only valid for text, integer, and float.
description: Length must be empty when Data Type is not text, integer, or float.

cited_guidance: SignificantDigits -- Conditional. Required if DataType is 'Float'. When DataType is float, both Length and SignificantDigits must be provided.
message: Significant Digits is missing but required when Data Type is float.
description: Significant Digits is required when Data Type is float.

cited_guidance: Length -- Integer. The variable length in characters.
message: Length must be a positive integer.
description: Length must be a positive integer when provided.

cited_guidance: text -- Char -- Maximum allowable length. SAS v.5 Transport files restrict variable lengths to 200 characters.
message: Text variable length exceeds 200 characters. SAS v5 Transport files restrict variable lengths to 200 characters.
description: Length must not exceed 200 for text variables (SAS v5 Transport limit).

message: Mandatory has an invalid value. Must be 'Yes' or 'No'.
description: Mandatory must be 'Yes' or 'No'.

cited_guidance: For regulatory submissions, def:Origin metadata must be provided for all variables.
message: Origin is missing. For regulatory submissions, def:Origin metadata must be provided for all variables at either the variable or value level.
description: Origin is required for all variables in regulatory submissions.

cited_guidance: Type -- Required. Origin type. The list of allowable values is not extensible.
message: Origin type is not valid. Must be one of: Collected, Derived, Assigned, Protocol, Predecessor, Not Available.
description: Origin Type must be a valid value. When populated, origin must be one of {Collected, Derived, Assigned, Protocol, Predecessor, Not Available}. Empty origins are scoped out of this rule and flagged by HRL-DD-053.

cited_guidance: For ADaM datasets -- Not Available is not valid.
message: Origin 'Not Available' is not valid for ADaM datasets.
description: For ADaM datasets (Purpose='Analysis'), Origin 'Not Available' is not a valid value.

cited_guidance: Source is required for SDTM and ADaM datasets when Origin Type is not Predecessor.
message: Source is missing. For SDTM and ADaM datasets, Source is required when Origin is not Predecessor.
description: Source is required for SDTM and ADaM variables when Origin is populated and not equal to 'Predecessor'.

cited_guidance: The Source is always 'Sponsor' for ADaM Derived and Assigned origin types.
message: ADaM Derived/Assigned variables must have Source = 'Sponsor'.
description: For ADaM datasets (Purpose='Analysis') with Origin in {Derived, Assigned}, Source must be 'Sponsor'.

cited_guidance: Allowed Source Values for SDTM: Subject, Investigator, Vendor, Sponsor.
message: SDTM Source value is not valid. Must be one of: Subject, Investigator, Vendor, Sponsor.
description: SDTM Origin Source must be a valid value.

cited_guidance: MethodOID -- Conditional. Required when the Type attribute for the def:Origin is 'Derived'. If the variable is derived, a MethodDef must be provided.
message: Method is missing but required when Origin is 'Derived'. A MethodDef must be provided for derived variables.
description: Method is required when Origin is 'Derived'.

cited_guidance: def:PDFPageRef -- Required for def:Origin/@Type='Collected' and def:Origin/@Source in ('Investigator','Subject').
message: Pages (CRF page reference) is missing. Required when Origin is 'Collected' and Source is 'Investigator' or 'Subject'.
description: Pages reference is required when Origin is 'Collected' and Source is 'Investigator' or 'Subject'.

cited_guidance: Predecessor -- An entry that is copied from a variable in another dataset. The Description child element identifies the dataset and variable.
message: Predecessor variable reference is missing. When Origin is 'Predecessor', the predecessor dataset.variable must be specified.
description: Predecessor field is required when Origin is 'Predecessor'.

cited_guidance: OrderNumber -- Optional. Integer. Display order of the variable within the domain dataset.
message: Variable order must be a positive integer.
description: Variable order must be a positive integer when provided.

cited_guidance: Each ItemOID used in an ItemRef must match an OID for an ItemDef. Variables are associated with datasets through ItemRefs contained in ItemGroupDef elements.
message: Dataset referenced in Variables sheet does not exist in the Datasets sheet.
description: Dataset referenced in Variables sheet must exist in the Datasets sheet.

cited_guidance: Each Value definition may have a Where Clause attached to describe when that Value applies.
message: Where Clause is missing. Each value-level metadata entry must have a Where Clause defining when the value applies.
description: Where Clause is required for all value-level metadata entries.

message: Where Clause comparator is not valid. Allowable values: LT, LE, GT, GE, EQ, NE, IN, NOTIN.
description: Where Clause comparators must be valid (LT, LE, GT, GE, EQ, NE, IN, NOTIN).

cited_guidance: DataType -- Required. See Section 4.3.1 for valid Define-XML DataType values.
message: Value-level Data Type is not a valid Define-XML type.
description: Data Type in value-level metadata must be a valid Define-XML data type.

cited_guidance: For ItemDef elements referenced from a ValueListDef, the Length must be less than or equal to the length of the parent variable.
message: Value-level Length exceeds the parent variable Length. For ItemDef referenced from a ValueListDef, Length must be <= parent variable length.
description: Value-level Length must not exceed the parent variable length.

cited_guidance: For regulatory submissions, def:Origin metadata must be provided for all variables. In some cases, def:Origin will be provided only at the Value level.
message: Origin is missing at value-level. For regulatory submissions, origin must be provided at either variable or value level.
description: Origin is required for value-level metadata in regulatory submissions.

cited_guidance: Value-level metadata is specified using def:ValueListDef elements linked to variable definitions.
message: Dataset.Variable in ValueLevel does not exist in the Variables sheet.
description: Dataset.Variable reference in ValueLevel must exist in the Variables sheet.

cited_guidance: MethodOID -- Conditional. Required when the Type attribute for the def:Origin is 'Derived'.
message: Method is missing at value level for a derived value. MethodOID is required when Origin Type is 'Derived'.
description: Method is required when Origin is 'Derived' at the value level.

cited_guidance: OID -- Required. Unique ID for the CodeList.
message: Codelist ID is missing. Each codelist entry must have an ID.
description: Codelist ID is required for each codelist entry.

cited_guidance: Business Rule: The Name must be unique within the set of Codelist elements.
message: Codelist Name is not unique. The Name must be unique within the set of CodeList elements.
description: Codelist Name must be unique within the specification.

cited_guidance: DataType -- Required. 'text', 'float', 'Integer'. The data type of the codes.
message: Codelist Data Type is not valid. Must be 'text', 'integer', or 'float'.
description: Codelist Data Type must be 'text', 'integer', or 'float'.

message: Codelist Term (CodedValue) is missing. Each codelist entry must have a term value.
description: Term (CodedValue) is required for each codelist entry.

cited_guidance: When used for regulatory submission, the Alias element is required for each CodeList that represents CDISC Controlled Terminology.
message: NCI Codelist Code is missing for a CDISC CT codelist. Alias with C-Code is required for CodeList elements representing CDISC CT.
description: NCI Codelist Code is required for codelists representing CDISC Controlled Terminology.

cited_guidance: Each EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem element that represents a defined term in CDISC Controlled Terminology also requires an Alias element.
message: NCI Term Code is missing for a term in a CDISC CT codelist. Alias with C-Code is required for each term in CDISC CT.
description: NCI Term Code is required for each term in a CDISC CT codelist.

cited_guidance: CodeListItem -- For Controlled Terminologies where there are Coded and Decoded values, a CodeListItem must be provided for each Item.
message: Decoded Value is missing for a codelist term. When a codelist uses CodeListItem format, all terms must have Decode values.
description: Decoded Value is required when codelist uses CodeListItem format (has both coded and decoded values).

cited_guidance: CodeListOID -- Required. Must match the OID of a CodeList element in the same MetaDataVersion.
message: Codelist referenced by variable does not exist in the Codelists sheet.
description: Codelist referenced by a variable must exist in the Codelists sheet.

cited_guidance: OID -- Required. Unique ID for the MethodDef.
message: Method ID is missing. Each method must have a unique ID.
description: Method ID is required and must be unique.

message: Method Type is not valid. Must be 'Computation' or 'Imputation'.
description: Method Type must be 'Computation' or 'Imputation'.

cited_guidance: Business Rule: Must contain the child Description element.
message: Method Description is missing. MethodDef must contain a Description element.
description: Method Description is required.

cited_guidance: MethodOID -- Reference to the unique ID of a MethodDef element. Required for each unique value of the MethodOID attribute.
message: Method ID referenced by a variable does not exist in the Methods sheet.
description: Method ID referenced by a variable must exist in the Methods sheet.

cited_guidance: OID -- Required. Unique ID for the CommentDef.
message: Comment ID is missing. Each comment must have a unique ID.
description: Comment ID is required and must be unique.

cited_guidance: Business Rule: Must contain the child Description element.
message: Comment Description is missing. CommentDef must contain a Description element.
description: Comment Description is required.

cited_guidance: def:CommentOID -- Must match the OID of a def:CommentDef element in the same MetaDataVersion.
message: Comment ID referenced does not exist in the Comments sheet.
description: Comment ID referenced by a dataset or variable must exist in the Comments sheet.

cited_guidance: leafID -- Required. Reference to the unique ID of the def:leaf element that contains the location of a file.
message: Document ID referenced does not exist in the Documents sheet.
description: Document ID referenced by a method or comment must exist in the Documents sheet.

cited_guidance: CodeListOID -- Must match the OID of a CodeList element in the same MetaDataVersion.
message: Variable references a Codelist ID that does not exist in the Codelists sheet.
description: Variable Codelist ID must exist in the Codelists sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: MethodOID -- Reference to the unique ID of a MethodDef element.
message: Variable references a Method ID that does not exist in the Methods sheet.
description: Variable Method ID must exist in the Methods sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: def:CommentOID -- Must match the OID of a def:CommentDef element.
message: Variable references a Comment ID that does not exist in the Comments sheet.
description: Variable Comment ID must exist in the Comments sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: CodeListOID -- Must match the OID of a CodeList element in the same MetaDataVersion.
message: ValueLevel references a Codelist ID that does not exist in the Codelists sheet.
description: ValueLevel Codelist ID must exist in the Codelists sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: MethodOID -- Reference to the unique ID of a MethodDef element.
message: ValueLevel references a Method ID that does not exist in the Methods sheet.
description: ValueLevel Method ID must exist in the Methods sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: def:CommentOID -- Must match the OID of a def:CommentDef element.
message: ValueLevel references a Comment ID that does not exist in the Comments sheet.
description: ValueLevel Comment ID must exist in the Comments sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: leafID -- Reference to the unique ID of the def:leaf element.
message: Method references a Document ID that does not exist in the Documents sheet.
description: Method Document ID must exist in the Documents sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: leafID -- Reference to the unique ID of the def:leaf element.
message: Comment references a Document ID that does not exist in the Documents sheet.
description: Comment Document ID must exist in the Documents sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: Each AnalysisResult must reference a valid AnalysisDisplay.
message: AnalysisResults references a Display ID that does not exist in the AnalysisDisplays sheet.
description: AnalysisResults Display ID must exist in the AnalysisDisplays sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: def:CommentOID -- Must match the OID of a def:CommentDef element.
message: Dataset references a Comment ID that does not exist in the Comments sheet.
description: Dataset Comment ID must exist in the Comments sheet when provided.

cited_guidance: Each distinct method is expected to have a unique MethodOID and can be referenced from different variables.
message: Method is defined but never referenced by any variable or value-level entry. Consider removing orphaned methods.
description: Method defined in Methods sheet but never referenced by any Variable or ValueLevel entry.

cited_guidance: Each distinct comment is expected to have a unique def:CommentOID and can be referenced from different variables.
message: Comment is defined but never referenced. Consider removing orphaned comments.
description: Comment defined in Comments sheet but never referenced by any Dataset, Variable, or ValueLevel entry.

cited_guidance: def:leaf elements provide the information needed to locate an external document file referenced in the Define-XML.
message: Document is defined but never referenced by any method or comment. Consider removing orphaned documents.
description: Document defined in Documents sheet but never referenced by any Method or Comment.

cited_guidance: For each controlled terminology referenced by variable or valuelist, a CodeList element must be provided.
message: Codelist is defined but never referenced by any variable or value-level entry. Consider removing orphaned codelists.
description: Codelist defined in Codelists sheet but never referenced by any Variable or ValueLevel entry.

cited_guidance: P21 DD0091: The armAnalysisVariable in the Analysis Results Metadata must be unique within an ARM.
message: AnalysisVariable is not unique within the AnalysisResult. Each variable should appear only once per result.
description: ARM AnalysisVariable must be unique within an AnalysisResult.

cited_guidance: P21 DD0096: The armAnalysisVariable in the Analysis Results Metadata is missing and must be populated.
message: AnalysisVariable is missing in the AnalysisResults sheet. Variables must be populated.
description: ARM AnalysisVariable is required when AnalysisResults are defined.

cited_guidance: P21 DD0099: Values for the AnalysisReason attribute are controlled by the Analysis Reason extensible codelist in ADaM CT.
message: AnalysisReason value is not in ADaM Controlled Terminology. Values are controlled by the Analysis Reason extensible codelist.
description: AnalysisReason must use valid ADaM Controlled Terminology values when provided.

cited_guidance: P21 DD0100: Values for the AnalysisPurpose attribute are controlled by the AnalysisPurpose extensible codelist in ADaM CT.
message: AnalysisPurpose value is not in ADaM Controlled Terminology. Values are controlled by the AnalysisPurpose extensible codelist.
description: AnalysisPurpose must use valid ADaM Controlled Terminology values when provided.

cited_guidance: P21 DD0109: USUBJID should always be derived/assigned in the same way.
message: Variable origin is inconsistent across datasets. Shared variables like USUBJID should have consistent origin metadata.
description: Variables shared across datasets (e.g., USUBJID) should have consistent Origin across all datasets.

cited_guidance: P21 OD0075/OD0080: Datatype of variable should match with Codelist datatype.
message: Variable Data Type does not match the referenced Codelist Data Type. These must be consistent.
description: Variable Data Type must match the referenced Codelist Data Type.

cited_guidance: P21 DD0029: If a codelist exists but not all terms are in CDISC CT, terms not included must have def:ExtendedValue set to 'Yes'.
message: Codelist term is not in standard CT but is not flagged as extended. Set def:ExtendedValue='Yes' for sponsor-added terms.
description: Extended codelist terms must be flagged with def:ExtendedValue when CT is non-extensible.
